title: lathyrus lanszwertii var. arizonicus
intro: Lathyrus lanszwertii var. arizonicus, also known as Arizona sweet pea, is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat kidney stones and urinary tract infections due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions to support urinary health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms associated with kidney stones. The health benefits of Lathyrus lanszwertii var. arizonicus include its potential to reduce the risk of kidney stones, improve urinary function, and provide relief from symptoms associated with urinary tract infections.
